narrative.headline: What 2016 Kia Optima owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints dominate owner reports for this model, with the most common descriptions centering on unintended acceleration, surging RPMs, and check-engine warnings while driving at various speeds. Electrical system and powertrain issues round out the picture, with owners describing post-parking fires and hesitation or shuddering when pulling away from a stop. Fuel and propulsion complaints mirror the powertrain pattern, with repeated hesitation on take-off reported even on low-mileage vehicles fresh from the dealership.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle accelerating on its own while driving, with engine RPMs climbing sharply and a check engine warning illuminating. · 15 fire · 4 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report vehicles catching fire and exploding after being parked, with the fire's origin believed to be electrical. · 5 fire · 6 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle shuddering and the engine feeling close to stalling when releasing the brake and attempting to pull away from a complete stop. · 1 crash

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report hesitation and shuddering upon take-off, persisting through multiple dealership visits without a resolved fix. · 6 fire · 1 injured
